# Ordered markers that must appear in talk-scene prompts (assembly regression guard).
VOICE:
PROTAGONIST:
THIS BEAT: The protagonist does NOT speak this beat unless they are only observing or moving.
FOCAL PERSON — Father Hale
GENERATION GUARDRAILS (simulation wins over improvisation):
HARD CONSTRAINTS (override everything above):
- LOCATION LOCK: Temple Row — the heavy door
- FOCAL PERSON THIS BEAT: id=p1
Write the scene now. Literary novel prose only — obey HARD CONSTRAINTS,
